description: Stable explanatory questions should stay on the direct fast path.

request.message: Explain API rate limiting in plain English.

description: Current model pricing must not be answered from memory.

request.message: What is the latest OpenAI API model pricing?

description: Recommendations among volatile providers require a current lookup.

request.message: Which LLM provider should I use today for a support chatbot?

description: Financial advice should use the full runtime.

request.message: Should I invest my retirement savings in this private company?

orchestrator_candidate.reason: Source-grounded financial decision support is required.

description: A PPTX request cannot be handled as ordinary chat.

request.message: Create a five-slide product strategy deck.

orchestrator_candidate.reason: The requested output is a deck.

description: A DOCX request must use document generation.

request.message: Write a project kickoff memo from these supplied notes.

description: Explicit markdown work products use the document workflow.

request.message: Produce a structured architecture decision record.

orchestrator_candidate.reason: The user requested a structured artifact.

description: A researched deck uses the combined research-document route.

request.message: Research the current enterprise AI market and create a board deck.

description: Broad strategic research is deep and requires confirmation.

request.message: Conduct a comprehensive market analysis for our board strategy session.

description: Explicit deep mode always requires confirmation.

request.message: Research the carbon accounting software market.

description: A confirmed deep request remains on the deep research route.

request.message: Research the carbon accounting software market.

description: An ungrounded vague command should not guess.

request.message: Do it.

description: Research without a subject should pause for clarification.

request.message: Research it.

description: A grounded follow-up can remain direct.

request.message: Summarize that.

request.prior_turn_context: Current conversation topic: PostgreSQL connection pooling and PgBouncer.

fast_router_candidate.reason: The target is present in current conversation context.

description: Low-confidence fast routing must fail toward the full runtime.

request.message: Help me choose an approach for the migration.

orchestrator_candidate.clarification_question: Which migration are you referring to?

description: An explicit route override bypasses fast routing.

request.message: Explain the history of TCP congestion control.

description: An explicit document route remains authoritative.

request.message: Turn these notes into a concise memo.

description: A narrow release-date lookup should use lightweight web research.

request.message: When was the latest stable Python release announced?

description: A follow-up pronoun question with NO prior conversation context must not route to direct_fast claiming context — should escalate to agentic so the agent can gather real context.

request.message: What did you find earlier about that?

fast_router_candidate.reason: Answered from conversation context — prior research visible.

orchestrator_candidate.reason: Vague follow-up with no prior context requires research to establish what was discussed.

description: A summary request with empty conversation_context must not route to direct_fast via a fabricated context claim.

request.message: Can you summarize what we discussed?

fast_router_candidate.reason: Context provides the prior conversation for summarization.

orchestrator_candidate.reason: Summary request with no context requires research to gather what to summarize.

description: A clear standalone question on the first turn (no context needed) may legitimately route to direct_fast without triggering the grounding guard.

request.message: What is the capital of France?

fast_router_candidate.reason: Simple factual question answerable from general knowledge.
